summary: Plan-mode PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected. Hydrated non-security PRs are classified independently and kept open for normal maintainer/author review; no close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned. Security-sensitive #84779 is quarantined to central security handling only. Candidate refs whose live state was unavailable in the preflight artifact are blocked for human/fresh hydration instead of being classified with missing target_updated_at.
